name: EO Sec. 3 maps to the frontier pre-release and provenance controls (H-16, H-15)
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'd=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0]); s3=d["controls"].find{|c| c["section"]==3}["maps_to"]; exit((s3 & ["H-16","H-15"]).size==2 ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/eo-control-mapping.yaml" && echo c22-sec3-bind 1>&2
